meta.title: How much does it cost to train a bomber pilot?
meta.description:
Here's how much it costs to train bomber pilots in the U.S. Air Force, according to a Rand Corporation analysis conducted in 2019. Training cost were then adjusted to 2023's inflation rate using the calculator provided by the Bureau of Labor and Statistics. 

You can find the full Rand Corp. report here: https://www.rand.org/pubs/research_reports/RR2415.html

#shorts #airpower #bomber #b1blancer #b2spirit #b52
